# services.omnom

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.omnom`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.omnom.dataDir` | `absolute path` | The directory where Omnom stores its data files. |
| `services.omnom.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Omnom, a webpage bookmarking and snapshotting service. |
| `services.omnom.group` | `non-empty string` | The Omnom service group. |
| `services.omnom.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Whether to open ports in the firewall. |
| `services.omnom.package` | `package` | The omnom package to use. |
| `services.omnom.passwordFile` | `null or absolute path` | File containing the password for the SMTP user. |
| `services.omnom.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The Omnom service port. |
| `services.omnom.settings` | `open submodule of (YAML 1.1 value)` | Configuration options for the /etc/omnom/config.yml file. |
| `services.omnom.settings.activitypub.privkey` | `absolute path` | ActivityPub private key. Will be generated, by default. |
| `services.omnom.settings.activitypub.pubkey` | `absolute path` | ActivityPub public key. Will be generated, by default. |
| `services.omnom.settings.app.debug` | `boolean` | Whether to enable debug mode. |
| `services.omnom.settings.app.disable_signup` | `boolean` | Whether to enable restricting user creation. |
| `services.omnom.settings.app.results_per_page` | `signed integer` | Number of results per page. |
| `services.omnom.settings.db.connection` | `string` | Database connection URI. |
| `services.omnom.settings.db.type` | `value "sqlite" (singular enum)` | Database type. |
| `services.omnom.settings.server.address` | `string` | Server address. |
| `services.omnom.settings.server.secure_cookie` | `boolean` | Whether to limit cookies to a secure channel. |
| `services.omnom.settings.smtp.connection_timeout` | `signed integer` | Connection timeout duration in seconds. |
| `services.omnom.settings.smtp.host` | `string` | SMTP server hostname. |
| `services.omnom.settings.smtp.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | SMTP server port address. |
| `services.omnom.settings.smtp.send_timeout` | `signed integer` | Send timeout duration in seconds. |
| `services.omnom.settings.smtp.sender` | `string` | Omnom sender e-mail. |
| `services.omnom.settings.smtp.tls` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Whether TLS encryption should be used.. |
| `services.omnom.settings.smtp.tls_allow_insecure` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Whether to allow insecure TLS.. |
| `services.omnom.settings.storage.type` | `string` | Storage type. |
| `services.omnom.user` | `non-empty string` | The Omnom service user. |
